briefdescription.para: CRDT transaction to make it all atomic.
Base path for writing DB files.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< boost::asio::io_context > ioContext, std::shared_ptr< ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > pubSub, std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipfs::graphsync::Network > graphsync, std::shared_ptr< libp2p::protocol::Scheduler > scheduler, std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipfs::graphsync::RequestIdGenerator > generator, std::string writeBasePath, std::string base58key)
memberdef.name: Migration0_2_0To1_0_0

briefdescription.para: Construct the step with all resources needed to open legacy DBs.

parameterdescription.para: Shared io_context for legacy DB access.
Base path for writing legacy DB files.
Base58-encoded peer key to form legacy paths.

briefdescription.para: Get the source version for this step.
Get the target version for this step.
Check if this migration should run.

simplesect.para: outcome::result<bool> true if migration should run; false to skip. On error, returns failure.

briefdescription.para: Apply the migration: initialize legacy DBs and migrate data.

simplesect.para: outcome::result<void> success on completion; failure on error.

briefdescription.para: Opens the target database to migrate into.

simplesect.para: The pointer to the database of Error

briefdescription.para: Open a legacy GlobalDB given a suffix ("out" or "in").

simplesect.para: Opened DB, nullptr if the legacy path is absent, or error.

briefdescription.para: Migrate all transactions and proofs from oldDb into newDb.

simplesect.para: outcome::result<void> success on commit; failure otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Copies transactions and proofs from legacy DB (“out” and “in”) into the new CRDT store.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
